## Description

What does this PR change and why? Keep it tight — the reviewer should be
able to skim this in 30 seconds.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks an existing API)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal-only
- [ ] Chore (build, CI, deps)

## Testing

How was this change tested? Include commands run and expected output where
useful.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated and passing locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck clean (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real resource IDs in the diff
- [ ] No AI attribution lines in commit messages (per `CLAUDE.md` §7)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or API surface changed
- [ ] Conventional Commit message used (e.g. `feat(react): ...`)
